1.gl: to be clear (orig. of sound, but usually of color); to shine; hence, to make ashow, to boast; and thus to be (clamorously) foolish; to rave; causatively, to celebrate; also to stultify
1.kj: (make) boast (self), celebrate, commend, (deal, make), fool(-ish, -ly), glory, give (light), be (make, feign self) mad (against), give in marriage, (sing, be worthy of) praise, rag

1.gl: an appellation, as amark or memorial of individuality; by implication honor, authority, character
1.dv: a primitive word (perhaps rather from through the idea of definite and conspicuous position; compare H8064 (שָׁמַיִם));

1.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
1.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).
Jah, the Lord, most vehement. Compare names in '-iah,' '-jah.'
1.dv: contraction for H3068 (יְהֹוָה), and meaning the same;

2.gl: properly, concealed, i.e. the vanishing point; generally, time out of mind (past or future), i.e. (practically) eternity; frequentatively, adverbial (especially with prepositional prefix) always

2.gl: to kneel; by implication to bless God (as an act of adoration), and (vice-versa) man (as a benefit); also (by euphemism) to curse (God or the king, as treason)
2.kj: [idiom] abundantly, [idiom] altogether, [idiom] at all, blaspheme, bless, congratulate, curse, [idiom] greatly, [idiom] indeed, kneel (down), praise, salute, [idiom] still, thank.

2.gl: to exist, i.e. be or become, come to pass (always emphatic, and not a mere copula or auxiliary)

2.gl: an appellation, as amark or memorial of individuality; by implication honor, authority, character
2.dv: a primitive word (perhaps rather from through the idea of definite and conspicuous position; compare H8064 (שָׁמַיִם));

2.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
2.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

2.gl: at this time, whether adverb, conjunction or expletive
2.kj: henceforth, now, straightway, this time, whereas.

3.gl: to be clear (orig. of sound, but usually of color); to shine; hence, to make ashow, to boast; and thus to be (clamorously) foolish; to rave; causatively, to celebrate; also to stultify
3.kj: (make) boast (self), celebrate, commend, (deal, make), fool(-ish, -ly), glory, give (light), be (make, feign self) mad (against), give in marriage, (sing, be worthy of) praise, rag

3.gl: an entrance (the place or the act); specifically sunset or the west; also (adverb with preposition) towards
3.kj: by which came, as cometh, in coming, as men enter into, entering, entrance into, entry, where goeth, going down, [phrase] westward. Compare H4126 (מוֹבָא).

3.gl: an appellation, as amark or memorial of individuality; by implication honor, authority, character
3.dv: a primitive word (perhaps rather from through the idea of definite and conspicuous position; compare H8064 (שָׁמַיִם));

3.gl: the sun; by implication, the east; figuratively, a ray, i.e. (architectural) a notched battlement
3.kj: [phrase] east side(-ward), sun (rising), [phrase] west(-ward), window. See also H1053 (בֵּית שֶׁמֶשׁ).
3.dv: from an unused root meaning to be brilliant;

3.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
3.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

4.gl: to be high actively, to rise or raise (in various applications, literally or figuratively)
4.kj: bring up, exalt (self), extol, give, go up, haughty, heave (up), (be, lift up on, make on, set up on, too) high(-er, one), hold up, levy, lift(-er) up, (be) lofty, ([idiom] a-) lou

4.gl: the sky (as aloft; the dual perhaps alluding to the visible arch in which the clouds move, as well as to the higher ether where the celestial bodies revolve)
4.dv: dual of an unused singular שָׁמֶה; from an unused root meaning to be lofty;

4.gl: a foreign nation; hence, a Gentile; also (figuratively) a troop of animals, or a flight of locusts
4.dv: rarely (shortened) גֹּי; apparently from the same root as H1465 (גֵּוָה) (in the sense of massing);

4.gl: properly, weight, but only figuratively in a good sense, splendor or copiousness
Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
4.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

5.gl: properly, to sit down (specifically as judge. in ambush, in quiet); by implication, to dwell, to remain; causatively, to settle, to marry
5.kj: (make to) abide(-ing), continue, (cause to, make to) dwell(-ing), ease self, endure, establish, [idiom] fail, habitation, haunt, (make to) inhabit(-ant), make to keep (house), lurk

5.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
5.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

5.gl: who? (occasionally, by a peculiar idiom, of things); also (indefinitely) whoever; often used in oblique construction with prefix or suffix
5.kj: any (man), [idiom] he, [idiom] him, [phrase] O that! what, which, who(-m, -se, -soever), [phrase] would to God.
5.dv: an interrogative pronoun of persons, as H4100 (מָה) is of things,

5.gl: to soar, i.e. be lofty; figuratively, to be haughty
5.kj: exalt, be haughty, be (make) high(-er), lift up, mount up, be proud, raise up great height, upward.

5.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
5.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

6.dv: dual of an unused singular שָׁמֶה; from an unused root meaning to be lofty;

6.gl: to depress or sink (expectation figuratively, to humiliate, intransitive or transitive)
6.kj: abase, bring (cast, put) down, debase, humble (self), be (bring, lay, make, put) low(-er).

6.gl: the earth (at large, or partitively a land)
6.kj: [idiom] common, country, earth, field, ground, land, [idiom] natins, way, [phrase] wilderness, world.
6.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be firm;

7.gl: a heap of rubbish or filth
7.dv: or אַשְׁפּוֹת; or שְׁפֹת; (contraction) plural of a noun of the same form as H827 (אַשְׁפָּה), from H8192 (שָׁפָה) (in the sense of scraping);

7.gl: dust (as powdered or gray); hence, clay, earth, mud
7.kj: ashes, dust, earth, ground, morter, powder, rubbish.

7.gl: properly, dangling, i.e. (by implication) weak or thin

7.dv: from H14 (אָבָה), in the sense of want (especially in feeling);

8.gl: properly, to sit down (specifically as judge. in ambush, in quiet); by implication, to dwell, to remain; causatively, to settle, to marry
8.kj: (make to) abide(-ing), continue, (cause to, make to) dwell(-ing), ease self, endure, establish, [idiom] fail, habitation, haunt, (make to) inhabit(-ant), make to keep (house), lurk

8.gl: adverb or preposition, with (i.e. in conjunction with), in varied applications; specifically, equally with; often with prepositional prefix (and then usually unrepresented in English)
8.kj: accompanying, against, and, as ([idiom] long as), before, beside, by (reason of), for all, from (among, between), in, like, more than, of, (un-) to, with(-al).

8.gl: a people (as a congregated unit); specifically, a tribe (as those of Israel); hence (collectively) troops or attendants; figuratively, a flock
properly, voluntary, i.e. generous; hence, magnanimous; as noun, a grandee (sometimes a tyrant)
